'''3B3-10''' was a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] in the service of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. He was part of the Federation occupation force during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], and fought a team of [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] members during the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. In the course of the engagement, his regiment commander was destroyed, and 3B3-10 took on the task of leading his fellow soldiers against the attackers. The entirety of the Federation's occupation force of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] was later deactivated when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] destroyed the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Droid Control Ship]].

==Biography==
3B3-10 was a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] in the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]].<ref name="tpm" /> In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC" /> he was a part of the force brought to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] by [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]]. Though Gunray's forces had initially simply [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|blockaded]] Naboo while protesting the taxation of trade routes recently introduced by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], they later invaded the [[Planet/Legends|world]], and occupied it.<ref name="tpm" />

[[File:Theed_Palace_Battle.png|thumb|left|275px|3B3-10's regiment battles the forces of Queen Amidala.]]
When [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]], ruler of the Naboo, led a team of [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Security Guards]] into the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]] in an attempt to capture Gunray, and put an end to the Federation's occupation of her home planet,<ref name="tpm" /> 3B3-10 was stationed in one of the Palace's main hallways.<ref name="ccg" /> He and the other troops in the regiment battled Amidala's force for some time, with neither side making any progress in particular.<ref name="tpm" /> The droid's commander fell to Amidala's blaster fire during the engagement, and so 3B3-10 himself assumed command of the regiment.<ref name="ccg" />

While under fire, 3B3-10 rerouted orders from the [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Droid Control Ship]] above, to himself.<ref name="ccg" /> Amidala's force eventually broke off from the engagement, and were able to bypass 3B3-10's regiment altogether by using [[Ascension gun/Legends|ascension guns]] to scale an external wall. The Droid Control Ship was later destroyed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], which resulted in the deactivation of all the Federation's forces on Naboo, as the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were all directly controlled from the ship itself. Gunray was captured by the Queen, and the Federation occupation of the planet came to an end.<ref name="tpm" />

==Features and functions==
Manufactured by [[Baktoid Combat Automata/Legends|Baktoid Combat Automata]],<ref name="db" /> 3B3-10 had [[Color/Legends|white]] plating, [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]],<ref name="tpm" /> [[Gender/Legends|masculine programming]],<ref name="ccg" /> and, like all B1 battle droids, stood 1.91 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="db" /> 3B3-10 was equipped with a standard [[E-5 blaster rifle/Legends|E-5 blaster rifle]], which he employed in combat against the forces of Queen Amidala. Even when in the heat of battle, he had the ability to redirect the orders coming from the Droid Control Ship to himself, instead of his fallen commander.<ref name="ccg" />

==Behind the scenes==
3B3-10 first appeared in [[George Lucas]]' [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. The droid was featured, unnamed, in the Palace battle toward the end of the film. He was later identified in the "[[Theed Palace Limited]]" set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].
